LanguageData.Fusion.label: Fusion
LanguageData.Fusion.description: A massively powerful nuclear fusion warhead.

LanguageData.DirtyBomb.label: Dirty
LanguageData.DirtyBomb.description: A bomb loaded with dangerous radioactive materials, designed to poison large areas with radiation.
